data.title: Distributed Systems
data.description: Google uses a global network of distributed systems to ensure high availability and scalability.
data.technical_spec: Edge computing with data centers across 200+ countries.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Dynamic load balancing to optimize resource use and ensure quick user response times.
data.technical_spec: Automatic traffic distribution with failover mechanisms.

data.title: Decoupled Services
data.description: Microservices architecture to allow individual components to update independently.

data.title: Bigtable and Spanner
data.description: Data storage solutions for handling massive amounts of structured data.
data.technical_spec: Highly scalable NoSQL and NewSQL databases.

data.title: Cloud Computing
data.description: Utilization of Google's own cloud infrastructure for moisture resource management.
data.technical_spec: Google Cloud Platform with VMs, Kubernetes and App Engine.
